## Active Technologies
- Bundled YAML assets; optional lightweight local cache for parsed/indexed data (no network required) (001-android-chatbot-search)

- Kotlin (Android) + Jetpack Compose (UI), AndroidX Navigation (screen transitions), Coroutines (async), YAML parser (for assets) (001-android-chatbot-search)
